languages.text: {n}Янур прищуривается, глядя вам в глаза, после чего коротко кивает:{/n} "Да поможет вам Бог-Император. Искупление для одного!"
{n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"
languages.original_text: {n}Янур прищуривается, глядя вам в глаза, после чего коротко кивает:{/n} "Да поможет вам Бог-Император. Искупление для одного!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"
{n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"

{n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n}{br}
"God-Emperor help you. Freedom for the one!"
{n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"
{n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"

languages.text: {n}ジャヌールは目を細めて君をじっと見つめ、そして首を短く振った。{/n}{br}「神皇帝が君を助けてくれるだろう。自由のために一人だ！」
languages.original_text:
{n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n}{br}
"God-Emperor help you. Freedom for the one!"

traits.locale_text: ジャンヌは目を細めて君をじっと見つめ、そして首を短く振った。{br}"神皇帝が君を助けてくれるだろう。自由のために一人だ！"

languages.text: {n}Janur sana dik dik bakarken gözlerini kısıyor, sonra kısaca başını sallıyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator yardımcınız olsun. Sona kalana kefaret!"
languages.original_text: {n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur sana dik dik bakarken gözlerini kısıyor, sonra kısaca başını sallıyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator yardımcınız olsun. Sona kalana kefaret!"

languages.text: {n}Janur entrecierra los ojos, te mira, y asiente brevemente.{/n} «Que el Dios Emperador le proteja. ¡Expiación para el último!».
languages.original_text: {n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur entrecierra los ojos, te mira, y asiente brevemente.{/n} «Que el Dios Emperador le proteja. ¡Expiación para el último!».

languages.text: {n}雅努尔眯起眼睛盯着你，然后简短地点了点头。{/n}“愿神皇保佑您。为了一人之赎！”
languages.original_text: {n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: {n}雅努尔眯起眼睛盯着你，然后简短地点了点头。{/n}“愿神皇保佑您。为了一人之赎！”

languages.text: {n}Janur fronce les sourcils en vous toisant de haut, puis il hoche sèchement la tête.{/n} « Que l'Empereur-Dieu vous aide. Expiation pour un seul ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur fronce les sourcils en vous toisant de haut, puis il hoche sèchement la tête.{/n} « Que l'Empereur-Dieu vous aide. Expiation pour un seul ! »

languages.text: {n}Janur starrt dich stirnrunzelnd an, ehe er höflich nickt.{/n} "Der Gottimperator stehe Euch bei. Sühne für den Einzelnen!"
languages.original_text: {n}Janur narrows his eyes as he stares you down, then he nods curtly.{/n} "God-Emperor help you. Atonement for the one!"
